subject: [PATCH 12/14] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: Addressed concerns about lock ordering and KCSAN by introducing a small helper to read the userfaultfd features atomically, and converting hot-path reads inside handle_userfault() and friends to use this helper.

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for toggling async mode at runtime using the UFFDIO_SET_MODE ioctl, allowing a VMM to switch between sync and async RWP modes on-the-fly. The feature is toggleable via an ioctl that takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags, with only UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC being toggleable today.
